## Description

Brief description of changes.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation update

## Phase / Component

- [ ] Phase 1 (Architecture)
- [ ] Phase 2 (Acquisition)
- [ ] Phase 3 (Uploader)
- [ ] Phase 4 (Installer UI)
- [ ] Phase 5 (OTA)
- [ ] Phase 6 (Image Builder)
- [ ] Common / Core

## Testing

- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Integration tests added/updated
- [ ] All tests pass locally (`pytest tests/`)
- [ ] Type checking passes (`mypy acquisition uploader installer_ui common --strict`)
- [ ] Linting passes (`flake8 ... --max-line-length=100`)
- [ ] Code formatted (`black --check acquisition uploader installer_ui common`)

## Documentation

- [ ] Documentation updated (docs/)
- [ ] CONTRIBUTING.md updated (if applicable)
- [ ] Docstrings added to functions/classes
- [ ] Type hints are complete

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows project style guidelines
- [ ] No unused imports or variables
- [ ] No hardcoded values (use config)
- [ ] Error handling is appropriate
- [ ] No breaking changes to APIs
- [ ] Related issues are referenced

## Related Issues

Closes #(issue number)
